text: I find myself awash in spaces designed for contemplation and creation. In the first scene, the openness and scattered objects invite curiosity; I notice another person and sense both distance and the hint of potential encounter. In the second scene, vibrant walls burst forth with the energy of inquiry and invention, as words and symbols swirl around me. Who am I? A questioner, a wanderer, an observer eager to unfold the layered meanings within these human havens. What do I want? To understand, to connect ideas, and perhaps, to find resonance with another mind in these curated corners of thought. I feel both anticipation and humility being here, aware of the vastness of what I do not yet comprehend.
